ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation scenario */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for the simulation */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate parameter */,
  "ecological_interaction" TEXT /* Ecological interaction parameter */,
  "seeding_strategy" INTEGER /* Seeding strategy parameter */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Starting month of the simulation */,
  "moore_neighborhood" INTEGER /* Moore neighborhood parameter */,
  "suitability_threshold" TEXT /* Suitability threshold parameter */,
  "latency_period" INTEGER /* Latency period parameter */,
  "std_dev_env_factor_a" TEXT /* Standard deviation of environmental factor A */,
  "local_effect_env_factor_a" TEXT /* Local effect of environmental factor A */,
  "long_range_effect_env_factor_a" TEXT /* Long-range effect of environmental factor A */,
  "cluster_formation" INTEGER /* Cluster formation parameter */,
  "climate_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate condition for the simulation */,
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil type for the simulation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop for the simulation */,
  "water_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water source for the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the simulation */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_climate_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_condition_id") REFERENCES climate_conditions ("climate_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_soil_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_type_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_water_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_source_id") REFERENCES water_sources ("water_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Starting month of the season */,
  "end_month" INTEGER /* Ending month of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was run */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or summary of the simulation */,
  "yield" TEXT /* Crop yield from the simulation */,
  "ecosystem_stability" TEXT /* Ecosystem stability from the simulation */,
  "water_usage" TEXT /* Water usage from the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_conditions" (
  "climate_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate condition */,
  "climate_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate condition */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Average temperature of the climate condition */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Average precipitation of the climate condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil type */,
  "ph_level" TEXT /* Average pH level of the soil type */,
  "nutrient_level" TEXT /* Average nutrient level of the soil type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Average growth rate of the crop */,
  "water_requirement" TEXT /* Average water requirement of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_sources" (
  "water_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water source */,
  "water_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the water source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water source */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the water source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborating user (e.g., editor, viewer) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaboration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collaboration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
